name: comfyq-desktop
description: ComfyQ – Discovery — LAN status of every ComfyQ machine

scripts._comment_dist: `npm run dist` builds an unsigned installer for the host OS only (no upload). Releases for all platforms are cut by CI: `npm run release:patch` bumps the version, tags it, and pushes — .github/workflows/release.yml then builds + publishes to GitHub Releases.
